name: Autonomous Domain LLM Builder (Search -> Raw Data -> Clean -> Chunk -> Train -> Ollama)

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$item(0).$node['Agent: Select Models'].json } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": $json.selected_base_model, "prompt": 'Return only JSON. Create ' + $json.max_queries + ' diverse web search queries to collect authoritative training material for the domain "' + $json.domain + '" and use case "' + $json.use_case + '". Prefer documentation, standards, tutorials, papers, regulations, implementation guides, and trusted practitioner write-ups. JSON schema: {"queries":["..."],"focus":["..."],"avoid":["..."]}', "stream": false, "format": "json", "options": { "temperature": 0.2 } } }}

={{ { "model": $node["Merge Model Context"].json.selected_base_model, "prompt": 'Return only JSON with a single key called system_prompt. Draft a concise system prompt for a locally fine-tuned assistant specialized in the domain "' + $node["Merge Model Context"].json.domain + '" and use case "' + $node["Merge Model Context"].json.use_case + '". Emphasize grounded answers, practical guidance, and honest uncertainty.', "stream": false, "format": "json", "options": { "temperature": 0.2 } } }}
